real_questions: How do you see the deregulation opportunity from the new administration's looser environment?
Will the number of products eventually start to decrease as you grow the business?
What would you buy to grow / improve the business?
Are you adopting feedback from regulators, looking at peers, or bringing in talent?

real_questions.text: What is going to drive hockey-stick growth?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: When will this hockey-stick growth happen?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Are there areas where you don't fully own the tech end-to-end?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: On the broker's side, is the goal to provide own products or open platform?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Who are your tech platform's main competitors?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: You are moving from fintech to a full-fledged bank — where are you in that evolution?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Is crypto an area that you're looking to get into? How are you planning to play in that space?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions: If equity markets corrected sharply, what share of your net revenues — wealth and investment management in particular — is exposed?

agency_intel.text: Moody's specifically tracks the fintech-to-full-bank transition. Expect questions on where the issuer is in that evolution, what regulator feedback they're absorbing, peer benchmarks they're following, and talent inflows they're bringing in.
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

agency_intel: Moody's stressed specific credit risks in the US banking sector and these are the focus areas through 2026: interest-rate policy and its predictability; a spike in medium- to long-term Treasury rates; CRE risks re-emerging; a stock-market crash — specifically wealth and investment management exposure, measured as segment net revenues as a share of total net revenues; consumer defaults and delinquencies; and the combination of significant deregulation, shadow-bank credit deterioration, and deposit runoff risks. Have a ready answer on exposure to each.
